title: Verify trial-corner-widget-viewed event triggers correctly
description: Test that the analytics event 'trial-corner-widget-viewed' fires when user views the widget

steps.description: 1. Log in with trial user account
2. Navigate to homepage where trial widget appears

expected_result: Event 'trial-corner-widget-viewed' is triggered with correct variant attribute (home-trial active/pause/cancel, pill, manage subscription)
